text:
UN top court says Israeli occupation of Palestinian territories is illegal

The UN’s top court has said Israel’s occupation of Palestinian territories is against international law, in a landmark opinion.

The International Court of Justice (ICJ) said Israel should stop settlement activity in the occupied West Bank and East Jerusalem and end its “illegal” occupation of those areas and the Gaza Strip as soon as possible.

We always forget that Israel’s current disproportionate ethnic cleansing war crime was always about the grotesque, obscene and illegal occupation of the Palestinian lands by Israel.

Israel’s radicalism and mutation from war crime victim to war crime perpetrator now takes on a Zionist perspective that sees all Palestinian land as theirs and the recent horrific violence in Gaza is just the latest step towards their intention of moving all Palestinians from those lands.

The IDF gets the Gold medal in war crimes which highlights the problem of Israel at the Olympics.

Russia and Belarus have been rightfully banned from the Olympics for their violence in the Ukraine, yet Israel’s disproportionate ethnic cleaning war crime of a response won’t have them banned from the Olympics?

8% of the entire Gazan population are either dead, wounded or detained while 77% of all buildings have been destroyed.

I’m no expert on war crimes or crimes humanity, but when you are getting solid percentages like that, it seems a tad murderous.

When your soldiers are caught tying the wounded to your vehicles, that moral high ground gets pretty subterranean.

Israel should probably be banned from the Olympics for its ethnic cleansing war crime eh?

At the very least let’s hope the other athletes shun them and won’t appear on any medal pedestals if they win any medals.

When you’ve committed an atrocity like the disproportionate response is, you don’t get to play with the other kids in the sandpit like nothings happened.

If civilised people won’t turn away in disgust and protest, then we are all stained by Israel’s appalling violence.

What Israel, empowered by America and Britain, have done in terms of causing 186 000 deaths will be a blight upon so called Western values for another generation.



Comments are closed.
title: IDF gets the Gold medal in war crimes – the problem of Israel at the Olympics | The Daily Blog
